KHAS SFL English Preparatory Program Guest Lecturer Announcement

Application deadline: December 20, 2024

Application Requirements

In order for the applications to be evaluated, the applicants must meet the following conditions:

1. To fulfill the general and special requirements specified in the Higher Education Law No. 2547 and the “Regulation on the Procedures and Principles Regarding the Central Examination and Entrance Examinations to be Applied in Appointments to Academic Staff Positions Other than Faculty Members” (published in the Official Gazette dated November 9, 2018);

For Turkish citizens:

Have at least a bachelor’s degree in related fields

To have a Master’s degree with thesis,

At least 3 years of teaching experience in English Preparatory Programs of universities in Turkey

At least 90 YDS score or an equivalent score from an internationally recognized proficiency test such as TOEFL.

For non-Turkish citizens whose first language is English:

Have at least a bachelor’s degree in related fields

or

At least a bachelor’s degree in another field and 2 years of language teaching experience in an internationally recognized school/center or CELTA/DELTA certificate

For non-Turkish citizens whose first language is not English:

At least a bachelor’s degree in a related field and 2 years of language teaching experience in an internationally recognized school/center and a CELTA/DELTA Certificate

Excellent spoken and written English

Applicants whose first language is not English must also submit a YDS score of at least 90 or an equivalent score from an internationally recognized proficiency test such as TOEFL.

How can you apply?

Applicants who meet the application requirements should send their CVs and statements of teaching philosophy (maximum 2 pages) to

[email protected]

before the announced deadlines.
